text.title: ClickUp Setup Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Adopting ClickUp OR auditing existing AND team size 1-15?

branch.when: (adopting_clickup == true OR auditing == true) AND team_size <= 15
branch.question: Multiple workflow types in scope AND admin access?
